spec_match.rationale: Calls getAllScreensMedia(), treats the result as one MediaStream per screen, paints each stream into its own <video>, and snapshots all videos to one canvas.

interactive.rationale: Capture / stop / layout selector / snapshot scale selector / snapshot are functional, with readiness feedback before drawImage is attempted.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Feature index promises a live tile dashboard with 2/3/4-column grids and a one-canvas snapshot — page delivers all three.

edge_cases.rationale: Outside an IWA the placeholder shows the error, snapshots wait for loaded video frames, and the source-pixels mode uses videoWidth/videoHeight for high-DPI captures.

references.rationale: See also includes the canonical ChromeStatus entry and the Capture All Screens spec.

design_system.rationale: The snapshot heading/canvas styles are class-based and the canvas fill reads --text-black from computed CSS variables; no raw hex or inline style attributes remain.

summary: The mosaic now uses the draft's stream sequence shape, cites the canonical feature references, keeps snapshot styling in CSS variables, and surfaces frame-readiness/high-DPI snapshot controls.
